messages.content: What is your return policy?

Here is information regarding the return policy:

*   Products must be returned undamaged and in the same condition as when delivered.
*   You can cancel your order without reason within 14 days from the day you received the goods (or the last good/lot/piece if delivered separately), or from the day of contract conclusion (e.g., digital content).
*   For excluded products, you can return them within 14 days as provided by law.
*   If you return an item in accordance with Amazon's return policy within 30 calendar days from the date of delivery (beyond the statutory 14-day period), you will be refunded the purchase price, but not the initial delivery costs (except for clothes, shoes, and bags).
*   The transport risk and return costs might be borne by you.
*   Specific policies apply to Fashion items (shoes, clothing, bags, jewelry, and watches).
*   Regarding return shipping charges:
    *   If the item is defective or wrong, we cover the return shipping.
    *   If you return due to a change of mind, the customer pays Rs. 150 for return shipping.
*   Exchanges are available for size/color variants only, following the same process as returns (mention "exchange" in your email). The exchange item is dispatched within 1-2 business days after your return is received.

Further information can be found on the Return policy page and in the Returns Centre.

sources.text:
undamaged and in the same condition as when they were delivered to you, except for 
the excluded products, for which you can decide to return the product by 14 days, as 
provided by law. In all cases, the applicable exceptions listed above apply. Further 
information can be found on our Return policy page. Products must be returned 
following the instructions available in our Returns Centre. 
If you decide to return the item in accordance with Amazon's return policy within 30 
(thirty) calendar days from the date of delivery and beyond the statutory 14-day period, 
we will refund to you the purchase price already paid by you, but not the delivery costs 
of your initial purchase (except in case of return of clothes, shoes and bags). Likewise, the 
transport risk and return costs might be borne by you. If you return Fashion items (shoes, 
clothing, bags, jewelry and watches) specific policies apply, for more details see our

invoicing effective as of 2019. 
Please note that all orders placed on the website must correspond to the typical needs of 
an average household. This applies both to the number of products ordered within a 
single order and the placing of several orders for the same product even where the 
individual orders comprise a quantity typical for a normal household. 
2. AMAZON RIGHT OF CANCELLATION, EXCEPTIONS AND AMAZON RETURNS POLICIES 
Unless one of the exceptions listed below applies, you can cancel your order without 
giving any reason within 14 days from the day on which you received the goods 
purchased (or last good, lot or piece if it relates to goods or multiple lots or pieces 
delivered separately) or from the day of the conclusion of the contract (including, but not 
limited to, contracts for the supply of digital content not supplied in a tangible medium, 
such as CD or DVD). If you have appointed a trusted person for the collection, your right

- Bank transfer: 3-5 business days
- Store credit/voucher: Instant (10% bonus credit added)
SHIPPING CHARGES ON RETURNS
- Defective/wrong item: We cover return shipping
- Change of mind: Customer pays Rs. 150 return shipping
CANCELLATION POLICY
Orders can be cancelled free of charge within 2 hours of placing.
After 2 hours: cancellation may not be possible if already dispatched.
Contact us immediately at 0800-FAST for cancellation requests.
EXCHANGE POLICY
Exchanges available for size/color variants only.
Same process as returns — mention "exchange" in your email.
Exchange item dispatched within 1-2 business days after we receive your return.

messages.content: What is Apple's privacy policy?

Apple is committed to your privacy. Their customer Privacy Policy provides a clear explanation of how they collect, use, disclose, transfer, and store your information.

You can access and manage your Apple data by visiting your Apple account management page. For corrections or general enquiries, you can contact their privacy team.

Topics covered in their privacy information include:
*   Privacy Policy
*   Apple ID and Family Sharing Disclosure
*   Privacy Governance
*   Government Information Requests
*   Manage Your Account

sources.text:
# Apple Customer Privacy Policy

Apple is committed to your privacy. Read our customer Privacy Policy for a clear explanation of how we collect, use, disclose, transfer, and store your information.

To access and manage your Apple data please visit [Manage your Apple account](https://appleid.apple.com/choose-your-country). For corrections or general enquiries, please [Contact Privacy](https://www.apple.com/legal/privacy/contact/).

JavaScript is required to view this content.

We work with third parties, such as advertisers, publishers, social media networks, searchengines, ad serving companies, and advertising companies working on their behalf, to improvethe relevance of ads we serve. In providing you interest-based ads we do not associate yourinteractions on unaﬃliated sites with information which on its own identiﬁes you, such asname or email address, and we do not provide any such information to advertisers or to third-party sites that display our interest-based ads. Advertisers and other third parties may assumethat users who interact with or click on an interest-based ad or content are part of the groupthat the ad or content is directed towards (for example, users in a particular geographical areaor users who purchased or browsed for classical music). messages.content: what is your policy ?

This Privacy Policy applies to the collection and processing of personal data in connection with our website. It explains how we collect and use your Personal Data. By visiting our website or purchasing from us, you agree to us handling your Personal Data according to this policy. Personal Data includes any information from which an individual can be identified, but not anonymous data like an IP Address.
